title: Detoxification - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Detoxification 16 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Deafness Homelessness Issues ADDICTIONS RECOVERY CENTER FRESH START WITHDRAWAL MANAGEMENT DETOXIFICATION AND SOBERING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides patients with a physically and emotionally stable environment to complete the detox process and prepare for transition into treatment. 1021 E Main Street Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 776-7086 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BESTCARE TREATMENT SERVICES KLAMATH FALLS RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT INPATIENT WITHDRAWAL MANAGEMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides medically-managed detox. 2555 Main Street Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 604-5735 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BESTCARE TREATMENT SERVICES REDMOND RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT INPATIENT WITHDRAWAL MANAGEMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides medically-managed detox. 676 NE Maple Avenue Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (458) 218-2027 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BRIDGEWAY COMMUNITY HEALTH MEDICALLY MANAGED WITHDRAWAL MEDICAL DETOX Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides medically managed withdrawal (detox) for individuals with substance use disorders relating to alcohol, fentanyl, heroin, opiate prescription medication, or methamphetamine use. The average length of stay is 7 days. 3321 Harold Drive Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (503) 399-5597 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTRAL CITY CONCERN HOOPER DETOXIFICATION STABILIZATION CENTER HOOPER DETOXIFICATION AND STABILIZATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides medical detoxification and stabilization from chemical dependency by providing outreach, sobering, and sub-acute medical detoxification. During the 6-10 day stay, clients receive medical treatment for early withdrawal symptoms, counseling, and referrals to other programs. 1535 N Williams Avenue Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Age 18 and older with no major medical problems that need to be addressed in a hospital setting Hours: Inpatient admission: Monday-Friday 6:45am-7:45am Outpatient: Monday-Friday 1pm-4pm Business: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 238-2067 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CODA BEAVERTON RECOVERY CENTER WITHDRAWAL MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides medical monitoring and support to individuals who have a physical dependence on alcohol, opiates, or other substances. The average length of stay is 3-5 days. 17911 NW Evergreen Place Beaverton, OR 97006 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (855) 733-2632 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EASTERN OREGON ALCOHOLISM FOUNDATION EASTERN OREGON COUNTY DETOXIFICATION CENTER EASTERN OREGON DETOXIFICATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides social and medically monitored detoxification services that focus on safe stabilization of clients. May also facilitate referrals to other addiction and/or medical services for discharged clients. 4708 NW Pioneer Place Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Age 18 and older who are currently using alcohol and/or drugs or are in physical danger due to withdrawal Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 278-2558 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FORA HEALTH DETOX SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides withdrawal management (detox) services. 10230 SE Cherry Blossom Drive Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Age 18 and older with primary diagnosis of alcohol or drug addictive disorders Hours: Detox: Monday-Sunday 7:30am Office: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30am, Saturday 7:30am-noon Weekends: OHP patients only Email (503) 535-1151 Get Directions Visit Website More Details INTEGRATED HEALTH CLINICS INTEGRATED HEALTH CLINICS EUGENE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides individual, group, and family counseling for outpatient substance use disorder treatment, specializing in methadone and suboxone maintenance, as well as DUII education and rehabilitation. Coordinates care with primary care physicians, social services, and court systems, and provides monthly progress reports to courts or other referral sources. Also offers a range of support services, including tuberculosis testing, HIV testing, hepatitis C education, and medication monitoring. 715 Lincoln Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 5:30am-2:30pm, Saturday 7am-1pm Email (541) 344-3574 Get Directions Visit Website More Details INTEGRATED HEALTH CLINICS INTEGRATED HEALTH CLINICS MILWAUKIE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides individual, group, and family counseling for outpatient substance use disorder treatment, specializing in methadone and suboxone maintenance, as well as DUII education and rehabilitation. Coordinates care with primary care physicians, social services, and court systems, and provides monthly progress reports to courts or other referral sources. Also offers a range of support services, including tuberculosis testing, HIV testing, hepatitis C education, and medication monitoring. 17882 SE McLoughlin Boulevard Portland, OR 97267 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 5:30am-2:30pm, Saturday 7am-12:30pm Email (503) 353-9415 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIFELINE CONNECTIONS LIFELINE CONNECTIONS EAST VANCOUVER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a full-service behavioral health agency with services including medically-assisted detoxification, substance use treatment, a residential program for substance use treatment, mental health outpatient treatment, a co-occurring disorder (i.e. mental health and substance use disorder), comprehensive outpatient substance use treatment, supported housing and employment, and sober living. Specializes in treatment for those addicted to opioids and alcohol by offering medication to assist in the recovery process. The Deaf and hard of hearing substance use treatment program is one of only a handful in the country. 11719 NE 95th Street Suite A/D Vancouver, WA 98682 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Appointments: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Medication Assisted Recovery (MAR) rapid response: Monday-Friday 9am-11am Email (360) 984-5511 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIFELINE CONNECTIONS LIFELINE CONNECTIONS VA CAMPUS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a full-service behavioral health agency with services including medically-assisted detoxification, substance use treatment, a residential program for substance use treatment, mental health outpatient treatment, a co-occurring disorder (i.e. mental health and substance use disorder), comprehensive outpatient substance use treatment, supported housing and employment, and sober living. Specializes in treatment for those addicted to opioids and alcohol by offering medication to assist in the recovery process. The Deaf and hard of hearing substance use treatment program is one of only a handful in the country. 1601 E Fourth Plain Boulevard Suite A212 Vancouver, WA 98663 Eligibility: Unrestricted, some outpatient programs are available for the Deaf or hard of hearing Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Detox: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Assessments: Monday-Thursday noon-3pm MAR Rapid Response: Wednesday 9am-11am Email (360) 397-8246 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEW DIRECTIONS NORTHWEST INC BAKER HOUSE RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM MEN'S & WOMEN'S BAKER HOUSE MENS & BAKER HOUSE WOMENS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Baker House is a 90-day residential treatment facility that provides detoxification for alcohol and drug addiction, including treatment for methamphetamine, opiates, alcohol and other drugs of abuse. Treatment is individualized and client centered, using evidence based practices. Treatment plans emphasize stages of change, motivational enhancement, cognitive thinking errors, relapse prevention planning, and individual, group, and family counseling. 3700 Midway Drive (Men) 3610 Midway Drive (Women) Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Ages 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 523-8320 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WHITE BIRD CLINIC WHITE BIRD CHRYSALIS CHRYSALIS BEHAVIORAL HEALTH OUTPATIENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient substance abuse services and treatment. Also offers support groups, drug education classes, couples and individual counseling, peer support, acupuncture, yoga, tai chi, parenting groups, women's groups, opiate primary group, medical reviews, drugs screening, after care, and DUII services that meet state requirements. 350 E 11th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm Email (541) 683-1641 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WHITE BIRD CLINIC NEST Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps individuals access primary medical care, case management, advocacy, outpatient drug and alcohol treatment, drug detox, mental health evaluation, counseling, SSI/SSDI assistance from a public benefits specialist, OHP application assistance, and transportation to appointments. 323 E 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Individuals experiencing homelessness Hours: Walk in services: Monday-Friday 9:30am-noon Scheduled case management appointments: Monday-Friday 1pm-4:30pm Reception and phone assistance: Monday-Friday 9:30am-3pm Email (541) 342-1295 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WILLAMETTE FAMILY INC WILLAMETTE FAMILY INC BUCKLEY CENTER BUCKLEY SOBERING AND DETOX SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides sobering and inpatient chemical dependency detoxification and referral services. Sobering services provide intoxicated people with a safe place to stay while the chemical effects of the intoxicants subside. Services include individual and group counseling, alcohol/drug education, disease concepts education, treatment planning, introduction to 12-step groups, nutrition and vitamin therapy, medical and vital signs monitoring, HIV/AIDS education and counseling, and treatment agency referrals. For ongoing treatment, patients may be referred to Willamette Family's Residential Treatment Program or referred to another agency. 640 W 7th Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 762-4575 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ADDICTIONS RECOVERY CENTER DETOXIFICATION AND SOBERING SERVICES BESTCARE TREATMENT SERVICES INPATIENT WITHDRAWAL MANAGEMENT SERVICES BESTCARE TREATMENT SERVICES INPATIENT WITHDRAWAL MANAGEMENT SERVICES BRIDGEWAY COMMUNITY HEALTH MEDICAL DETOX CENTRAL CITY CONCERN HOOPER DETOXIFICATION AND STABILIZATION CENTER CODA WITHDRAWAL MANAGEMENT EASTERN OREGON ALCOHOLISM FOUNDATION EASTERN OREGON DETOXIFICATION CENTER FORA HEALTH DETOX SERVICES INTEGRATED HEALTH CLINICS INTEGRATED HEALTH CLINICS EUGENE INTEGRATED HEALTH CLINICS INTEGRATED HEALTH CLINICS MILWAUKIE NEW DIRECTIONS NORTHWEST INC BAKER HOUSE MENS & BAKER HOUSE WOMENS WHITE BIRD CLINIC CHRYSALIS BEHAVIORAL HEALTH OUTPATIENT SERVICES WHITE BIRD CLINIC NEST WILLAMETTE FAMILY INC BUCKLEY SOBERING AND DETOX SERVICES
